title: Mumbai Port Trust Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 22 Pilot Posts
description: Mumbai Port Trust has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 22 Pilot Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Intermediate (10+2) can grab this chance and apply for the Mumbai Port Trust Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply on or before the last date of application. If you are looking f...
